item.title: GigaVis Wins 7.2 Billion-Won Inspection Equipment Order From Chinese Substrate Maker
item.description: GigaVis secures a significant commercial order for its automated optical inspection equipment from a Chinese substrate manufacturer, highlighting market demand.

item.title: Zinkteknik Builds Digital-First Manufacturing Strategy with Plex Platform
item.description: Automotive supplier Zinkteknik adopts the Plex Smart Manufacturing Platform to establish a scalable digital foundation for its new manufacturing operations.

item.title: COREX ONE Brings Industrial CT Inspection Directly to the Production Floor
item.description: COREX ONE introduces a new self-shielded industrial CT inspection system designed for routine production-floor automated defect detection and dimensional measurement.

item.title: AT Sensors Advances Inline Metrology with Ultra-High-Resolution C7 XCS 3070
item.description: AT Sensors developed the C7 XCS 3070 3D laser profile sensor for ultra-high-resolution inline metrology, capturing precise surface structures.

item.title: Visometry Expands Mobile AR Quality Inspection Capabilities with Twyn 2.6
item.description: Visometry releases Twyn 2.6 mobile AR-based inspection system to make component inspection faster and more flexible for quality professionals.

item.title: Portable Inspection Adapts to Smart Manufacturing
item.description: Portable inspection systems are evolving into connected, intelligent components within the digital manufacturing ecosystem to improve quality control and reduce downtime.

item.title: IMTS Announces 2026 Conferences Lineup
item.description: The upcoming IMTS 2026 conference lineup reveals key commercial themes in manufacturing technology and quality control systems.
